mapper.select: select l.* from nx_department_distributer_label as dl left join nx_distributer_label as l on l.nx_distributer_label_id = dl.nx_ddl_distributer_label_id where dl.nx_ddl_department_id = #{depId} and dl.nx_ddl_distributer_id = #{disId} and (l.nx_dl_status is null or l.nx_dl_status = 1) order by l.nx_dl_sort asc, l.nx_distributer_label_id desc

select * from nx_department as d left join nx_department_user as u on u.nx_DU_department_id = d.nx_department_id where d.nx_department_dis_id = #{disId} and u.nx_DU_admin = 1 and
d.nx_department_type = 1
d.nx_department_type = 2

select d.nx_department_id 'd_nx_department_id', d.nx_department_address 'd_nx_department_address', d.nx_department_name 'd_nx_department_name', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type',
d.nx_department_father_id 'd_nx_department_father_id', d.nx_department_is_group_dep 'd_nx_department_is_group_dep', d.nx_department_dis_id 'd_nx_department_dis_id', d.nx_department_show_weeks 'd_nx_department_show_weeks', d.nx_department_sub_amount 'd_nx_department_sub_amount', d.nx_department_type 'd_nx_department_type', d.nx_department_attr_name 'd_nx_department_attr_name', d.nx_department_order_code 'd_nx_department_order_code', d.nx_department_type 'd_nx_department_type', d.nx_department_print_name 'd_nx_department_print_name', d.nx_department_working_status 'd_nx_department_working_status', d.nx_department_dis_id 'd_nx_department_dis_id', d.nx_department_join_date 'd_nx_department_join_date', d.nx_department_order_total 'd_nx_department_order_total', d.nx_department_pinyin 'd_nx_department_pinyin', subsd.nx_department_id 'subs_nx_department_id', subsd.nx_department_name 'subs_nx_department_name', subsd.nx_department_pick_name 'subs_nx_department_pick_name', subsd.nx_department_order_code 'subs_nx_department_order_code', subsd.nx_department_settle_type 'subs_nx_department_settle_type', subsd.nx_department_type 'subs_nx_department_type', subsd.nx_department_print_name 'subs_nx_department_print_name', subsd.nx_department_show_weeks 'subs_nx_department_show_weeks', subsd.nx_department_father_id 'subs_nx_department_father_id', subsd.nx_department_is_group_dep 'subs_nx_department_is_group_dep', subsd.nx_department_dis_id 'subs_nx_department_dis_id', subsd.nx_department_sub_amount 'subs_nx_department_sub_amount', subsd.nx_department_dis_id 'subs_nx_department_dis_id', subsd.nx_department_join_date 'subs_nx_department_join_date', subsd.nx_department_pinyin 'subs_nx_department_pinyin', subsd.nx_department_order_total 'subs_nx_department_order_total',
dis.nx_distributer_name, dis.nx_distributer_id, dis.nx_distributer_address, dis.nx_distributer_manager, dis.nx_distributer_phone, dis.nx_distributer_img, dis.nx_distributer_img, diu.nx_distributer_user_id, diu.nx_DIU_wx_nick_name, diu.nx_DIU_wx_avartra_url, diu.nx_DIU_distributer_id, diu.nx_DIU_admin from nx_department as d left join nx_department as subsd on subsd.nx_department_father_id = d.nx_department_id left join nx_department as grandSub on grandSub.nx_department_father_id = subsd.nx_department_id left join nx_distributer as dis on dis.nx_distributer_id = d.nx_department_dis_id left join nx_distributer_user as diu on diu.nx_DIU_distributer_id = dis.nx_distributer_id where d.nx_department_id = #{nxDuDepartmentId} and d.nx_department_is_group_dep = 1 and diu.nx_DIU_admin = 1

select * , # f.nx_department_id 'f_nx_department_id', # f.nx_department_address 'f_nx_department_address', # f.nx_department_earliest_delivery_time 'f_nx_department_earliest_delivery_time', # f.nx_department_latest_delivery_time 'f_nx_department_latest_delivery_time', # f.nx_department_lat 'f_nx_department_lat', # f.nx_department_lng 'f_nx_department_lng', # f.nx_department_app_id 'f_nx_department_app_id', # f.nx_department_pick_name 'f_nx_department_pick_name', # f.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'f_nx_department_promotion_goods_id', # f.nx_department_name 'f_nx_department_name', # f.nx_department_settle_type 'f_nx_department_settle_type', # f.nx_department_show_weeks 'f_nx_department_show_weeks', # f.nx_department_father_id 'f_nx_department_father_id', # f.nx_department_is_group_dep 'f_nx_department_is_group_dep', # f.nx_department_dis_id 'f_nx_department_dis_id', # f.nx_department_type 'f_nx_department_type', # f.nx_department_print_name 'f_nx_department_print_name', # f.nx_department_sub_amount 'f_nx_department_sub_amount', # f.nx_department_file_path 'f_nx_department_file_path', # f.nx_department_settle_type 'f_nx_department_settle_type', # f.nx_department_join_date 'f_nx_department_join_date', # f.nx_department_order_total 'f_nx_department_order_total', # f.nx_department_pinyin 'f_nx_department_pinyin', # f.nx_department_working_status 'f_nx_department_work_status',
d.nx_department_record_minutes 'd_nx_department_record_minutes',
d.nx_department_father_id 'd_nx_department_father_id', d.nx_department_id 'd_nx_department_id', d.nx_department_address 'd_nx_department_address', d.nx_department_earliest_delivery_time 'd_nx_department_earliest_delivery_time', d.nx_department_latest_delivery_time 'd_nx_department_latest_delivery_time', d.nx_department_unload_duration 'd_nx_department_unload_duration', d.nx_department_lat 'd_nx_department_lat', d.nx_department_lng 'd_nx_department_lng', d.nx_department_app_id 'd_nx_department_app_id', d.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'd_nx_department_promotion_goods_id', d.nx_department_name 'd_nx_department_name', d.nx_department_pick_name 'd_nx_department_pick_name', d.nx_department_order_code 'd_nx_department_order_code', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type', d.nx_department_father_id 'd_nx_department_father_id', d.nx_department_is_group_dep 'd_nx_department_is_group_dep', d.nx_department_dis_id 'd_nx_department_dis_id', d.nx_department_show_weeks 'd_nx_department_show_weeks', d.nx_department_sub_amount 'd_nx_department_sub_amount', d.nx_department_type 'd_nx_department_type', d.nx_department_print_name 'd_nx_department_print_name', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type', d.nx_department_attr_name 'd_nx_department_attr_name', d.nx_department_order_code 'd_nx_department_order_code', d.nx_department_file_path 'd_nx_department_file_path', d.nx_department_working_status 'd_nx_department_working_status', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type', d.nx_department_join_date 'd_nx_department_join_date', d.nx_department_order_total 'd_nx_department_order_total', d.nx_department_pinyin 'd_nx_department_pinyin', d.nx_department_points 'd_nx_department_points', d.nx_department_waiting_points 'd_nx_department_waiting_points',
subsd.nx_department_id 'subs_nx_department_id', subsd.nx_department_earliest_delivery_time 'subs_nx_department_earliest_delivery_time', subsd.nx_department_latest_delivery_time 'subs_nx_department_latest_delivery_time', subsd.nx_department_lat 'subs_nx_department_lat', subsd.nx_department_lng 'subs_nx_department_lng', subsd.nx_department_app_id 'subs_nx_department_app_id', subsd.nx_department_pick_name 'subs_nx_department_pick_name', subsd.nx_department_order_code 'subs_nx_department_order_code', subsd.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'subs_nx_department_promotion_goods_id', subsd.nx_department_name 'subs_nx_department_name', subsd.nx_department_settle_type 'subs_nx_department_settle_type', subsd.nx_department_show_weeks 'subs_nx_department_show_weeks', subsd.nx_department_father_id 'subs_nx_department_father_id', subsd.nx_department_is_group_dep 'subs_nx_department_is_group_dep', subsd.nx_department_dis_id 'subs_nx_department_dis_id', subsd.nx_department_type 'subs_nx_department_type', subsd.nx_department_print_name 'subs_nx_department_print_name', subsd.nx_department_sub_amount 'subs_nx_department_sub_amount', subsd.nx_department_file_path 'subs_nx_department_file_path', subsd.nx_department_settle_type 'subs_nx_department_settle_type', subsd.nx_department_join_date 'subs_nx_department_join_date', subsd.nx_department_order_total 'subs_nx_department_order_total', subsd.nx_department_pinyin 'subs_nx_department_pinyin', subsd.nx_department_working_status 'subs_nx_department_work_status'
from nx_department as d left join nx_department as subsd on subsd.nx_department_father_id = d.nx_department_id # left join nx_department as f on f.nx_department_id = d.nx_department_father_id and d.nx_department_father_id != 0 left join nx_distributer as dis on dis.nx_distributer_id = d.nx_department_dis_id where d.nx_department_id = #{nxDuDepartmentId}
select * from nx_department where nx_department_father_id = #{depId} and nx_department_is_group_dep = 0
select fd.nx_department_id, fd.nx_department_name from nx_department as d left join nx_department as fd on d.nx_department_father_id = fd.nx_department_id where d.nx_department_id = #{depId}

select * ,
d.nx_department_record_minutes 'd_nx_department_record_minutes', d.nx_department_id 'd_nx_department_id', d.nx_department_address 'd_nx_department_address', d.nx_department_app_id 'd_nx_department_app_id', d.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'd_nx_department_promotion_goods_id', d.nx_department_name 'd_nx_department_name', d.nx_department_pick_name 'd_nx_department_pick_name', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type', d.nx_department_father_id 'd_nx_department_father_id', d.nx_department_is_group_dep 'd_nx_department_is_group_dep', d.nx_department_dis_id 'd_nx_department_dis_id', d.nx_department_show_weeks 'd_nx_department_show_weeks', d.nx_department_sub_amount 'd_nx_department_sub_amount', d.nx_department_type 'd_nx_department_type', d.nx_department_print_name 'd_nx_department_print_name', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type', d.nx_department_attr_name 'd_nx_department_attr_name', d.nx_department_order_code 'd_nx_department_order_code', d.nx_department_file_path 'd_nx_department_file_path', d.nx_department_working_status 'd_nx_department_working_status', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type', d.nx_department_join_date 'd_nx_department_join_date', d.nx_department_order_total 'd_nx_department_order_total', d.nx_department_pinyin 'd_nx_department_pinyin',
f.nx_department_id 'f_nx_department_id', f.nx_department_address 'f_nx_department_address', f.nx_department_earliest_delivery_time 'f_nx_department_earliest_delivery_time', f.nx_department_latest_delivery_time 'f_nx_department_latest_delivery_time', f.nx_department_lat 'f_nx_department_lat', f.nx_department_lng 'f_nx_department_lng', f.nx_department_app_id 'f_nx_department_app_id', f.nx_department_pick_name 'f_nx_department_pick_name', f.nx_department_order_code 'f_nx_department_order_code', f.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'f_nx_department_promotion_goods_id', f.nx_department_name 'f_nx_department_name', f.nx_department_settle_type 'f_nx_department_settle_type', f.nx_department_show_weeks 'f_nx_department_show_weeks', f.nx_department_father_id 'f_nx_department_father_id', f.nx_department_is_group_dep 'f_nx_department_is_group_dep', f.nx_department_dis_id 'f_nx_department_dis_id', f.nx_department_type 'f_nx_department_type', f.nx_department_print_name 'f_nx_department_print_name', f.nx_department_sub_amount 'f_nx_department_sub_amount', f.nx_department_file_path 'f_nx_department_file_path', f.nx_department_settle_type 'f_nx_department_settle_type', f.nx_department_join_date 'f_nx_department_join_date', f.nx_department_order_total 'f_nx_department_order_total', f.nx_department_pinyin 'f_nx_department_pinyin', f.nx_department_working_status 'f_nx_department_work_status'
from nx_department as d left join nx_department as f on f.nx_department_id = d.nx_department_father_id left join nx_distributer as dis on dis.nx_distributer_id = d.nx_department_dis_id
where d.nx_department_id = #{nxDuDepartmentId}

select * , f.nx_department_id 'f_nx_department_id', f.nx_department_points 'f_nx_department_points', f.nx_department_waiting_points 'f_nx_department_waiting_points', f.nx_department_address 'f_nx_department_address', f.nx_department_earliest_delivery_time 'f_nx_department_earliest_delivery_time', f.nx_department_latest_delivery_time 'f_nx_department_latest_delivery_time', f.nx_department_lat 'f_nx_department_lat', f.nx_department_lng 'f_nx_department_lng', f.nx_department_app_id 'f_nx_department_app_id', f.nx_department_pick_name 'f_nx_department_pick_name', f.nx_department_order_code 'f_nx_department_order_code', f.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'f_nx_department_promotion_goods_id', f.nx_department_name 'f_nx_department_name', f.nx_department_settle_type 'f_nx_department_settle_type', f.nx_department_show_weeks 'f_nx_department_show_weeks', f.nx_department_father_id 'f_nx_department_father_id', f.nx_department_is_group_dep 'f_nx_department_is_group_dep', f.nx_department_dis_id 'f_nx_department_dis_id', f.nx_department_type 'f_nx_department_type', f.nx_department_print_name 'f_nx_department_print_name', f.nx_department_sub_amount 'f_nx_department_sub_amount', f.nx_department_file_path 'f_nx_department_file_path', f.nx_department_settle_type 'f_nx_department_settle_type', f.nx_department_join_date 'f_nx_department_join_date', f.nx_department_order_total 'f_nx_department_order_total', f.nx_department_pinyin 'f_nx_department_pinyin', f.nx_department_working_status 'f_nx_department_work_status',
d.nx_department_record_minutes 'd_nx_department_record_minutes',
d.nx_department_id 'd_nx_department_id', d.nx_department_points 'd_nx_department_points', d.nx_department_waiting_points 'd_nx_department_waiting_points', d.nx_department_father_id 'd_nx_department_father_id', d.nx_department_address 'd_nx_department_address', d.nx_department_app_id 'd_nx_department_app_id', d.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'd_nx_department_promotion_goods_id', d.nx_department_name 'd_nx_department_name', d.nx_department_pick_name 'd_nx_department_pick_name', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type', d.nx_department_father_id 'd_nx_department_father_id', d.nx_department_is_group_dep 'd_nx_department_is_group_dep', d.nx_department_dis_id 'd_nx_department_dis_id', d.nx_department_show_weeks 'd_nx_department_show_weeks', d.nx_department_sub_amount 'd_nx_department_sub_amount', d.nx_department_type 'd_nx_department_type', d.nx_department_print_name 'd_nx_department_print_name', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type', d.nx_department_attr_name 'd_nx_department_attr_name', d.nx_department_order_code 'd_nx_department_order_code', d.nx_department_file_path 'd_nx_department_file_path', d.nx_department_working_status 'd_nx_department_working_status', d.nx_department_settle_type 'd_nx_department_settle_type', d.nx_department_join_date 'd_nx_department_join_date', d.nx_department_order_total 'd_nx_department_order_total', d.nx_department_pinyin 'd_nx_department_pinyin',
subsd.nx_department_id 'subs_nx_department_id', subsd.nx_department_app_id 'subs_nx_department_app_id', subsd.nx_department_pick_name 'subs_nx_department_pick_name', subsd.nx_department_order_code 'subs_nx_department_order_code', subsd.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'subs_nx_department_promotion_goods_id', subsd.nx_department_name 'subs_nx_department_name', subsd.nx_department_settle_type 'subs_nx_department_settle_type', subsd.nx_department_show_weeks 'subs_nx_department_show_weeks', subsd.nx_department_father_id 'subs_nx_department_father_id', subsd.nx_department_is_group_dep 'subs_nx_department_is_group_dep', subsd.nx_department_dis_id 'subs_nx_department_dis_id', subsd.nx_department_type 'subs_nx_department_type', subsd.nx_department_print_name 'subs_nx_department_print_name', subsd.nx_department_sub_amount 'subs_nx_department_sub_amount', subsd.nx_department_file_path 'subs_nx_department_file_path', subsd.nx_department_settle_type 'subs_nx_department_settle_type', subsd.nx_department_join_date 'subs_nx_department_join_date', subsd.nx_department_order_total 'subs_nx_department_order_total', subsd.nx_department_pinyin 'subs_nx_department_pinyin', subsd.nx_department_working_status 'subs_nx_department_work_status',
dsubsd.nx_department_id 'dsubs_nx_department_id', dsubsd.nx_department_app_id 'dsubs_nx_department_app_id', dsubsd.nx_department_pick_name 'dsubs_nx_department_pick_name', dsubsd.nx_department_order_code 'dsubs_nx_department_order_code', dsubsd.nx_department_promotion_goods_id 'dsubs_nx_department_promotion_goods_id', dsubsd.nx_department_name 'dsubs_nx_department_name', dsubsd.nx_department_settle_type 'dsubs_nx_department_settle_type', dsubsd.nx_department_show_weeks 'dsubs_nx_department_show_weeks', dsubsd.nx_department_father_id 'dsubs_nx_department_father_id', dsubsd.nx_department_is_group_dep 'dsubs_nx_department_is_group_dep', dsubsd.nx_department_dis_id 'dsubs_nx_department_dis_id', dsubsd.nx_department_type 'dsubs_nx_department_type', dsubsd.nx_department_print_name 'dsubs_nx_department_print_name', dsubsd.nx_department_sub_amount 'dsubs_nx_department_sub_amount', dsubsd.nx_department_file_path 'dsubs_nx_department_file_path', dsubsd.nx_department_settle_type 'dsubs_nx_department_settle_type', dsubsd.nx_department_join_date 'dsubs_nx_department_join_date', dsubsd.nx_department_order_total 'dsubs_nx_department_order_total', dsubsd.nx_department_pinyin 'dsubs_nx_department_pinyin', dsubsd.nx_department_working_status 'subs_nx_department_work_status'
from nx_department as d left join nx_department as f on f.nx_department_id = d.nx_department_father_id left join nx_department as dsubsd on dsubsd.nx_department_father_id = d.nx_department_id left join nx_department as subsd on subsd.nx_department_father_id = f.nx_department_id left join nx_distributer as dis on dis.nx_distributer_id = d.nx_department_dis_id
where d.nx_department_id = #{nxDuDepartmentId}
select * from nx_department where nx_department_settle_type = 2 and nx_department_dis_id = #{id} and nx_department_is_group_dep = 1
mapper.delete:
delete from nx_department where nx_department_id in
#{nxDepartmentId}
